mapper.select:
SELECT /* CanCustMapper.selectCanCustListExcel */ A.CONTRACT_NUM AS CONTRACT_NUM /* 계약번호 */ , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'RCP9004' AND CD_VAL = B.REQ_BUY_TYPE) AS REQ_BUY_TYPE_NM /* 구매유형 */ , B.FST_RATE_NM AS FST_RATE_NM /* 최초요금제명 */ , B.SALE_PLCY_CD AS SALE_PLCY_CD , B.SALE_PLCY_NM AS SALE_PLCY_NM /* 판매정책 */ , NVL(TRIM(SUBSTR(FST_MODEL_INFO, 21,30)), A.MODEL_NAME) AS FST_MODEL_NM /* 최초개통단말 */ , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'MSP0003' AND CD_VAL = A.SUB_STATUS) AS SUB_STATUS_NM /* 상태 */ , CASE WHEN A.SUB_STATUS = 'C' THEN CASE WHEN TO_DATE(SUBSTR(A.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD') - TO_DATE(A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') = 0 THEN '당일개통취소' WHEN TO_DATE(SUBSTR(A.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD') - TO_DATE(A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') < 15 THEN '14일이내해지' WHEN TO_DATE(SUBSTR(A.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD') - TO_DATE(A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') < 90 THEN '90일이내해지' ELSE '일반해지' END ELSE '' END AS CAN_RSN /* 해지사유 */ , DECODE(A.ON_OFF_TYPE, '1', '오프라인', '온라인') AS ON_OFF_TYPE_NM /* 모집경로 */ , (SELECT ORGN_NM FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = A.OPEN_AGNT_CD) AS AGENT_NM /*대리점명 */ , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS OPEN_DT /* 개통일자 */ , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(A.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1,8), 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CAN_DT /* 해지일자 */ , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(B.SIM_INFO, 36, 1) IN ('A', 'R') THEN (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0058' AND CD_VAL = SUBSTR(B.SIM_INFO, 1, 2)) ELSE (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0058' AND CD_VAL = SUBSTR(B.INST_INFO, 1, 2)) END AS SPRT_TP_NM /* 할인유형 */ FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A, MSP_REQUEST_DTL B WHERE 1 = 1
AND A.SUB_STATUS_DATE >= #{searchStartDt} || '000000' AND A.SUB_STATUS_DATE <= #{searchEndDt} || '235959'
AND A.SUB_STATUS = 'C' AND A.PPPO = 'PO' AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM
AND A.SUB_LINK_NAME LIKE '%' || #{searchName} || '%'
AND (A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{searchName} OR A.CONTRACT_NUM = (SELECT DISTINCT CONTRACT_NUM FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO_HIST WHERE SVC_CNTR_NO = #{searchName}))
AND A.SUBSCRIBER_NO = #{searchName}
AND A.OPEN_AGNT_CD = #{cntpntShopId}
ORDER BY A.SUB_STATUS_DATE
